properties.query: SELECT u.user_no AS instructor_id, u.user_name AS instructor_name, SUM(s.final_amount) AS total_revenue FROM USER u JOIN SETTLEMENT s ON u.user_no = s.instructor_id WHERE s.status = 'COMPLETED' GROUP BY u.user_no, u.user_name ORDER BY total_revenue DESC
INSERT INTO settlement ( course_id, instructor_id, raw_amount, commission, final_amount ) VALUES ( ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
